---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability, lane, metric, or reference
title: "[feat] "
labels: [enhancement]
---

## The problem

What can't you do today, or what's harder than it should be?

## Proposed change

What you'd like BLACK SEA to do.

## Compliance check

A new capability has to keep the guard (see `CONTRIBUTING.md`). Confirm your idea:

- [ ] Keeps the **Prime Directive** — no fabricated sources; findings stay FACT / ASSESSMENT / ASSUMPTION.
- [ ] Stays within the **collection boundaries** — open-source and lawful; no dark-web / stolen-data / private-PII.
- [ ] Defines any new leading word in `CONTEXT.md` + the glossary.

## Alternatives considered

Other ways to solve this, and why the proposal is better.
